name: Wrike
tagline: Versatile project management for enterprise teams
description: Wrike is an enterprise-grade project management platform with powerful customisation, cross-tagging, request forms, and dashboards. Popular with marketing, creative, and PMO teams that need structured workflows at scale.
cons: Can feel heavy for small teams
UI not as modern as monday.com
use_cases: Your marketing or creative team needs structured intake via request forms that route briefs into the right project automatically
You're running a PMO with multiple concurrent projects and need cross-tagging, portfolio dashboards, and resource load balancing
You manage work across departments where the same task appears in multiple project contexts and cross-tagging keeps everything linked
Your enterprise team needs custom workflows, approval chains, and SSO that lighter tools like Trello or Basecamp don't support
